initial_demand.formal:
Dear {buyer_name},

An amount of Rs {amount} is outstanding against invoice(s) {invoice_numbers} dated {dates}. Under Section 15 of MSMED Act, payment became due in {due_days} days and is now overdue by {days_overdue} days. Under Section 16, compound interest at {rate}% per annum is payable, amounting to Rs {interest}.

Please remit total Rs {total} (principal Rs {principal} + interest Rs {interest}) within 7 days to avoid escalation to MSEFC.

Regards,
{mse_name}
initial_demand.concise: Outstanding Rs {principal} + statutory interest Rs {interest} is due under MSMED Act Sections 15-16. Kindly settle Rs {total} within 7 days.
initial_demand.relationship_preserving: We value our business relationship. Please clear Rs {total} at the earliest so we can avoid formal proceedings.

reminder.day_7: Gentle reminder: Payment of Rs {total} remains pending for invoice(s) {invoice_numbers}. Please confirm release date immediately.
reminder.day_15: Despite prior notice, Rs {total} remains unpaid. We request immediate payment confirmation within 48 hours.
reminder.final: Final reminder before MSEFC filing: outstanding Rs {total} with statutory interest under Section 16.

counter_offer.accept_partial: Without prejudice, we can consider settlement at Rs {counter_amount} if paid by {deadline}.
counter_offer.reject_low: Your offer of Rs {offer} is not acceptable as it is below principal liability. Revised proposal requested.
counter_offer.principal_focus: As a concession, we are willing to waive part interest if full principal Rs {principal} is paid by {deadline}.

escalation_warning.pre_msefc: If payment is not received by {deadline}, we will file formal reference before MSEFC under Section 18.
escalation_warning.ghosting: No response has been received. This is a 7-day final opportunity before escalation.
escalation_warning.bad_faith: Repeated delays without substantive justification will be treated as non-cooperation in UNP.

settlement_offer.lump_sum: Full and final settlement proposal: Rs {settlement_amount}, payable in one tranche by {date}.
settlement_offer.installment_2: Settlement proposal: Rs {settlement_amount} in 2 installments as per attached schedule.
settlement_offer.installment_3: Settlement proposal: Rs {settlement_amount} in 3 installments with default revival clause.

acceptance.standard: We accept your revised offer of Rs {settlement_amount}, subject to signed settlement agreement and payment timeline.
acceptance.with_terms: Offer accepted subject to default clause, confidentiality, and MSMED governing law terms.

rejection.insufficient: We are unable to accept this proposal as it does not cover principal dues and timeline risk.
rejection.delayed: Proposal rejected due to unacceptable payment horizon beyond {max_days} days.
